title: IHC on fixed frozen cryo sections
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"46k2t","text":"All incubation steps in humidifier tray (slide box with PBS soaked paper towels) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bsph8","text":"All wash steps in coplin jars (no agitation)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 30-60 min Protein Block 5% Normal Horse (or Donkey) Serum in PBS + 0.3% Triton-X
Overnight (~18-22hrs) Primaries at 4C in PBS + 0.3% Triton-X
2hr Secondaries at room temp in PBS + 0.3% Triton-X
